entities.name: PADDY
entities.description: Oryza sativa L., the crop used in the nutrient management study

entities.name: LEGUME BIOCHAR FERTILIZER
entities.description: A novel fertilizer derived from legume biochar used as an alternative to compost

entities.name: COMPOST
entities.description: Legume-derived organic matter used for nutrient management in paddy

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Synthetic fertilizers whose continuous use is detrimental to soil health and productivity

entities.name: MINERAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Inorganic fertilizers used in integrated nutrient management with biochar

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The biological, chemical, and physical state of the soil

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The capacity of the soil to function and maintain crop yield

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of the crop's output and efficiency

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop harvested per unit area

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Strategies for applying nutrients to ensure sustainable crop production

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT STUDY
entities.description: An experimental approach used to assess different nutrient management options

entities.name: SOIL TEST-BASED BALANCED FERTILIZATION
entities.description: A method of applying nutrients based on the specific needs of the soil

entities.name: NUTRIENT-POOR VERTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil with low nutrient content found in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where the nutrient-poor vertisols are located

entities.name: TOTAL-N CONTENT
entities.description: The total nitrogen content present in the fertilizer

entities.name: MACRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Primary nutrients required by plants in large quantities

entities.name: SECONDARY NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Nutrients required by plants in moderate quantities

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Trace nutrients required by plants in small quantities

entities.name: SURFACE AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the biochar or compost particles

entities.name: C:N RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of carbon to nitrogen in the organic fertilizer

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERIC INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interactions between plant roots and the surrounding soil environment

entities.name: PLANT NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: The process by which plants absorb nutrients from the soil

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH ATTRIBUTES
entities.description: Physical characteristics indicating the growth and health of the plant

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The carbon stored in the soil organic matter

entities.name: CARBON-NEGATIVE FERTILIZATION TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A fertilization method that results in a net removal of carbon from the atmosphere

entities.name: AGRORESIDUES
entities.description: Agricultural waste materials that can be recycled into biochar or compost
